mapper.select: SELECT o.*, c.name as customer_name, u.real_name as user_name FROM sales_order o LEFT JOIN customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.*, c.name as customer_name, u.real_name as user_name FROM sales_order o LEFT JOIN customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT o.*, c.name as customer_name, u.real_name as user_name FROM sales_order o LEFT JOIN customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
SELECT o.*, c.name as customer_name, u.real_name as user_name FROM sales_order o LEFT JOIN customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sales_order (order_no, customer_id, user_id, total_amount, status) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{customerId}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sales_order SET customer_id=#{customerId}, total_amount=#{totalAmount}, status=#{status} WHERE id = #{id}
